Row.Text: A civilization led by Akane Kurokawa. Centered on the LALALAI Troupe and Stage Actors, it uses performances, district synergy, and role switching to spread cultural strength into faith, science, production, and combat.

Akane Kurokawa excels at reading the stage and understanding roles. By switching among Hoshino Ai, Sayahime, and Hoshino Ruby, she can redirect cultural, faith, science, production, and combat strengths to whatever the moment demands.

The LALALAI Troupe grants extra yields to adjacent specialty districts and boosts relevant building yields by +20%. Campuses, Commercial Hubs, Harbors, Encampments, and Holy Sites adjacent to a LALALAI Troupe also gain matching Great Person points. Stage Actor performances trigger stackable empire-wide Art Prosperity that strengthens district output across your cities.

Akane starts in a Not Selected state and can switch between Hoshino Ai, Sayahime, and Hoshino Ruby. Each switch immediately changes her active bonuses (10-turn cooldown on Standard speed), grants +8% to all yields for half of the current game-speed cooldown duration, and awards a burst of Gold that scales with the current turn. Base effect "Reasoning Master": always grants +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture, grants +1 [ICON_Science] Science to Campuses adjacent to a LALALAI Troupe, and grants an additional +10% [ICON_Science] Science after researching Mathematics.

Unique district replacing the Theater Square. Provides +2 [ICON_Culture] Culture and +2 Amenities, gains +2 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent City Center or Wonder, and grants +1 [ICON_Gold] Gold to adjacent Commercial Hubs and Harbors, +1 [ICON_Science] Science to Campuses, +1 [ICON_Production] Production to Encampments and Industrial Zones, and +1 [ICON_Faith] Faith to Holy Sites.

Akane's unique civilian unit with 3 performances. Each performance targets an owned LALALAI Troupe in one of your cities (one performance per city), permanently grows that city's Culture output, and removes the unit only after the final show.

Perform on this owned LALALAI Troupe. Uses 1 performance charge ({1_num} remaining). One performance per city. Permanently grants this city +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture; Amphitheater, Art Museum, Archaeological Museum, and Broadcast Center in this city each gain an additional +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture and +20% Tourism from their associated Great Works. Also starts stackable empire-wide Art Prosperity. The unit is removed only after its final performance.
[ICON_Culture] Stage performance reward applied. This unit has {1_num} performance(s) remaining. Empire-wide Art Prosperity is active: {2_num} stack(s), {3_num} turn(s) remaining.
Akane mode switching is ready again.

Adopt Hoshino Ai's role focus. Grants +1 [ICON_Faith] Faith; Great Prophet points are +1 flat and +1 per Holy Site district; and +30% [ICON_Faith] Faith. After switching, gain +8% to all yields for half your current cooldown and receive a Gold burst that scales with the current turn.

Adopt Sayahime's role focus. Grants +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture; Great Artist points are +1 flat and +1 per LALALAI Troupe district; +20% [ICON_Culture] Culture; and +30% Tourism. After switching, gain +8% to all yields for half your current cooldown and receive a Gold burst that scales with the current turn.

Adopt Hoshino Ruby's role focus. Grants +5 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength, +20% experience; Great General points are +1 flat and +1 per Encampment district; and +20% [ICON_Production] Production. After switching, gain +8% to all yields for half your current cooldown and receive a Gold burst that scales with the current turn.
Switched to {1}. This mode is now on cooldown for {2_num} turn(s); +8% to all yields lasts {3_num} turn(s), and you immediately gain {4_num} [ICON_Gold] Gold.
Mode switch unavailable. {1_num} turn(s) of cooldown remaining.
Akane mode switching is not available for this player.
+1 [ICON_Culture] Culture from each adjacent Entertainment Complex.
+2 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent City Center.
+1 [ICON_Science] Science from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Faith] Faith from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
